data.body:
3. Fest Recruitment

- During Fest Recruitment, the acquisition probability of the 3★ student group is doubled. (Existing: 3% → Fest Recruitment Period: 6%)

- During Pick-Up Recruitment, you can use Recruitment Points for Selective Acquisition of Pick-Up students.

- When Pick-Up Recruitment ends, Recruitment Points will be converted to Keystone Pieces, at a 1:1 ratio, and sent to your mailbox.

* Please check the "12/23 (Tue) Fest Recruitment Notice" for more details.
- Mika (3★, Swimsuit) Fest Recruitment Schedule: 12/23 (Tue) 2:00 AM – 12/30 (Tue) 1:59 AM (UTC)
  ![image2025121515074514.png](https://kivo.wiki/files/4417/SjJQwvdEbyo2l5W1ytZ1wb48WyOUGJGH.jpg)
